providers.name: Offline
providers.description: No AI calls are made. The app uses only the built-in JavaScript Summary Engine.
providers.notes: Default and safest mode. No network requests are made.

providers.name: GapGPT
providers.notes: Replace apiKey above with your real GapGPT key. Model name must match what your GapGPT account supports.

providers.name: LM Studio
providers.description: Local OpenAI-compatible server running on your own machine.
providers.notes: Start the LM Studio local server first. If the page is served over HTTPS (GitHub Pages) and LM Studio runs on HTTP, your browser may block the request as mixed content or CORS. Test locally if this happens.
